title: explosive touch
description: The mod will add difficulty to your game, now blocks explode when breaking, and besides that mobs also when you kill them.
body:
![explosive touch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22d46c33bc555e35969183f17ff7ca9c08caed93.png)

## ![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **description!**

**This mod will add incredible difficulty to your game, this mod is a new complication during the playthrough, when playing with this mod all blocks that you will break will explode, also besides this when breaking blocks you will have the breaking texture of blocks changed, but this is not all, when you kill mobs they also explode because your hand has now become dynamite (:**

**The mod is an interesting challenge, especially when playing with a friend.**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5a23d9aa754e615f86d589eabaa7b45adfb964.png)
## ![snac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- Now when breaking blocks an explosion will occur, and also when killing mobs an explosion will also occur.

![t1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d02fd43ee66be96df596adb95cfaaada200f558a.png)
- The texture of breaking blocks has also been changed.

![t2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdb4e7dd426b4585af98356b8d96c82818249d6f.png)
- The mod also changes your hand which calmly renders on any skin, your hand is now, so to speak, infected with dynamite and any of your touch leads to an explosion, specifically the hands of the player model and the first-person hand model are changed, moreover the mod includes a 3-pixel hand model, upon joining everything renders automatically.

- Also, when hitting any mob, particles will be emitted from it.

![long-range weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48f0e5d2ec3d9dec8201b5bfb684d37902e7a9ff_0.webp)



- The mod includes 4 commands to disable or enable functions for convenience.


```
/blockstattnt                        
```


```
/modstattnt 
```
                         

```
/armtntdisplays                                                                       
```

```
/tntparticles
```


After the command name, write either ‘true’ or ‘false’, thereby disabling or enabling this function. The /blockstattnt command is responsible for block explosions, and /modstattnt for mob explosions. In simpler terms, if you need it, you can disable one of these for convenience, or both.

The /armtntdisplays command is already responsible for rendering your arm; in it you also need to enter ‘true’ or ‘false’, thereby if the modified arm bothers you, you can remove it.

The /tntparticles command controls the display of particles when hitting mobs; you still set it to “true” or “false”

- also in the mod there are its own custom achievements.

![tntadwencher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a190388c346b0ea9788d0975f4294e2440f26e71.png)
achievements in the mod 10 first 2 the easiest just break the first block and kill the first mob and the rest see yourself"

also all achievements are translated into Russian.
## ![heh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png)  **Important note**

-When entering the world, your first-person hand will always initially be 4 pixels; if your skin has 3-pixel arms, the first-person hand will not change immediately but only after the screen refreshes, for example after you open the inventory or change the view, for example to third person

-Can you play with friends? Answer: YES, you can play with friends, there shouldn’t be any serious problems, but if you find a bug in multiplayer or just in singleplayer, just write a comment

-If the modified block breaking texture is not displaying, most likely it is placed below the regular textures in the resource packs. Just go into the resource packs and move the mod’s resources above the regular ones.

-The /blockstattnt, /modstattnt, and /tntparticles commands apply to the entire world; when something is disabled, the change affects all players.

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b99825e26418c6cb0eaf125374f112d5a4253ee.png)
